purpose: Reference of open climate data worldwide for a 3D-globe visualization and prediction pipelines (incl. AMOC collapse timing).

field_definitions.name: dataset/platform name
field_definitions.globe: true if easy to render on a WebGL globe (tiles/Zarr/COG/gridded)
field_definitions.amoc: true if directly relevant to AMOC state estimation / tipping-point prediction

records.name: ERA5 / ERA5T
records.access: CDS API (cdsapi); web download; ARCO/AWS mirrors
records.variables: T2m, winds, precip, MSLP, radiation, SST, soil, 240+ vars

records.name: ARCO-ERA5 (cloud-optimized)
records.notes: Best for ML pipelines & tile generation, no queueing

records.name: ERA5-Land
records.variables: soil moisture/temp, snow, runoff, ET, T2m

records.name: MERRA-2
records.notes: Only long reanalysis with integrated aerosols

records.name: CRU TS v4.09
records.variables: T, precip, PET, cloud, vapour, 10 vars

records.name: GHCN-daily
records.access: NCEI Data Service API; AWS noaa-ghcn-pds

records.name: HadISD v3
records.variables: QC'd hourly T, dewpoint, pressure, wind

records.name: DWD Open Data
records.variables: station obs, grids, radar; also GPCC

records.name: Met Office MIDAS Open + DataHub
records.variables: UK T, rain, wind, soil, radiation

records.name: MeteoSwiss OGD
records.variables: station obs, grids, radar, ICON forecasts
records.notes: Fully open since 2025, modern STAC · Live globe layer in this app.

records.name: KNMI Data Platform
records.variables: station obs, radar, HARMONIE; hosts E-OBS

records.name: E-OBS v31
records.notes: Best open pan-European daily grid · Live globe layer in this app.

records.name: GPM IMERG V07
records.notes: Premier global precip; Early run = live rain layer · Live globe layer in this app.

records.name: GPCP v2.3/v3.2
records.notes: Climate-record precip standard · Live globe layer in this app.

records.name: IGRA v2.2 (radiosonde)
records.variables: sounding profiles: P, height, T, RH, wind; CAPE

records.name: CERES EBAF Ed4.2.1
records.variables: TOA/surface SW/LW fluxes, net imbalance, clouds

records.name: ISCCP H-Series
records.variables: cloud amount, type, optical depth, top pressure

records.name: NASA POWER
records.access: Open REST API (no key); AWS Zarr
records.variables: solar irradiance, T2m, wind, RH, precip

records.name: NOAA PSL Gridded Archive
records.notes: Uniform CF NetCDF across dozens of datasets

records.name: NOAA NCEI Access / CDO API
records.access: REST APIs (data service v1 tokenless; CDO token)
records.notes: Single gateway to US station archives

records.name: Open-Meteo
records.variables: T, precip, wind, radiation from ERA5(-Land)+forecasts

records.name: RAPID-MOCHA-WBTS 26.5N
records.access: Email-gated download; DOI at BODC; amocatlas
records.variables: AMOC transport (Sv), Gulf Stream, Ekman, MHT, streamfunction

records.name: OSNAP
records.notes: Subpolar overturning where AMOC signals emerge

records.name: SAMBA 34.5S
records.variables: MOC volume & heat transport, upper+abyssal cell
records.notes: Only sustained South Atlantic AMOC array

records.name: AMOCatlas
records.notes: Single entry point to harmonize all AMOC series

records.name: Caesar et al. 2018 SST fingerprint
records.variables: AMOC index from subpolar cold-blob SST

records.name: EN4.2.2 objective analyses
records.variables: gridded T/S + profiles, density, steric, OHC (4 bias variants)
records.notes: In-situ basis for AMOC density/salinity early-warning

records.name: Argo GDAC
records.notes: Backbone subsurface T/S for OHC/steric/AMOC density

records.name: BGC-Argo
records.variables: O2, NO3, pH, chl-a, backscatter + T/S

records.name: NOAA OISST v2.1
records.notes: High-res daily SST; NRT cold-blob index input · Live globe layer in this app.

records.name: Copernicus Marine SEALEVEL (DUACS)
records.notes: ADT + surface currents; altimetry AMOC proxy input

records.name: GLORYS12 ocean reanalysis
records.notes: Eddy-resolving; compute AMOC at any latitude

records.name: ORAS5
records.notes: Long ensemble reanalysis for AMOC variability

records.name: SODA3
records.notes: Independent reanalysis for AMOC hindcast cross-validation

records.name: OceanSITES
records.variables: full-depth T/S/velocity, fluxes at reference sites

records.name: TAO/TRITON, PIRATA, RAMA
records.variables: SST, subsurface T/S, currents, winds, fluxes
records.notes: PIRATA feeds tropical Atlantic AMOC context

records.name: GO-SHIP / CCHDO
records.variables: full-depth CTD T/S/O2, nutrients, carbon, tracers
records.notes: Gold standard for deep AMOC calibration

records.name: NASA Ocean Color (OB.DAAC)
records.notes: PACE hyperspectral color · Live globe layer in this app.

records.name: SMOS sea surface salinity
records.notes: Surface salinity for AMOC freshwater diagnostics

records.name: SMAP sea surface salinity
records.notes: Subpolar salinity anomalies = AMOC precursor · Live globe layer in this app.

records.name: Copernicus Marine Service (CMEMS)
records.variables: 300+ products: physics, biogeochem, sea level, SST, ice, waves

records.name: NOAA CoastWatch/PolarWatch ERDDAP
records.variables: SST, ocean color, altimetry, winds, currents, buoys
records.notes: Uniform ERDDAP REST access to dozens of products

records.name: NSIDC Sea Ice Index v4
records.variables: sea ice extent, area, concentration, anomalies

records.name: AWI CryoSat-2/SMOS thickness
records.variables: sea ice thickness, freeboard, snow depth + uncertainty

records.name: IMBIE ice sheet mass balance
records.notes: Consensus mass-loss curve for tipping models

records.name: GSFC ice-sheet mass change series
records.notes: Clean per-ice-sheet Gt series for dashboards

records.name: ITS_LIVE ice velocity
records.notes: Anonymous cloud Zarr; easiest big cryosphere dataset

records.name: BedMachine Greenland v5 / Antarctica v3
records.variables: bed elevation, ice thickness, surface, mask
records.notes: Definitive bed topography; marine-based basins = collapse-prone

records.name: PROMICE / GC-Net
records.variables: Greenland AWS (T, radiation, ablation, velocity); ice discharge; SMB

records.name: Greenland/Antarctic surface melt (NSIDC-0533 + Ice Sheets Today)
RACMO / MAR regional SMB
records.variables: surface mass balance, runoff, snowfall, melt

records.name: Randolph Glacier Inventory v7
records.notes: Base glacier geometry + modeling spatial index

records.name: WGMS Fluctuations of Glaciers + mass change
records.variables: in-situ/geodetic mass balance, front variation >2000 glaciers

records.name: ESA Snow CCI SWE v2
records.variables: daily snow water equivalent + uncertainty; snow-cover fraction

records.name: ESA Permafrost CCI v5
records.variables: ground temperature, active layer thickness, extent
records.notes: Only continuous circumpolar permafrost product; carbon-tipping input

records.name: GTN-P permafrost database
records.access: Web download per site; PANGAEA bulk

records.name: QGreenland
records.notes: Pre-styled Greenland stack for globe prototyping

records.name: Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem
records.access: STAC API; OData; S3 (eodata); openEO; Sentinel Hub
records.notes: Full Sentinel access; Sentinel Hub tiling

records.name: Sentinel Hub / Copernicus Browser
records.notes: Best dynamic tile source for a globe

records.name: Copernicus WEkEO
records.access: Harmonized Data Access (HDA) REST API; JupyterHub
records.notes: One key for every Copernicus service

records.name: NASA Earthdata / CMR
records.access: CMR REST + CMR-STAC; Harmony; Earthdata Cloud S3
records.notes: Best programmatic entry to all NASA EO

records.name: NASA GIBS / Worldview
records.variables: 1000+ time-enabled layers (true color, SST, aerosol, snow/ice, precip)
records.notes: Single most important tile service for a 3D globe

records.name: NASA DAACs (GES DISC, PO.DAAC, LP DAAC, ORNL, ASDC...)
records.variables: IMERG, MERRA-2, MUR SST, CERES, ICESat-2, HLS...
records.notes: Discipline archives of core climate records

records.name: Landsat Collection 2
records.access: M2M API; LandsatLook STAC; AWS s3://usgs-landsat

records.name: NOAA Open Data Dissemination (NODD)
records.notes: Workhorse free bucket layer, no egress

records.name: GOES-16/18/19
records.variables: 16-band ABI imagery, GLM lightning, SST, fire, aerosol

records.name: JPSS (Suomi-NPP, NOAA-20/21)
records.variables: VIIRS imagery, SST, fires, aerosol, day/night band

records.name: EUMETSAT Data Store
records.access: REST Download API; EUMETView WMS; Data Tailor
records.variables: Meteosat/MTG (full disk), Metop/EPS-SG, OSI SAF/CM SAF CDRs

records.name: JAXA G-Portal / P-Tree
records.variables: AMSR2 (ice, SST, soil moisture), GCOM-C, GPM DPR, Himawari

records.name: ESA Climate Change Initiative (CCI)
records.notes: Reference ECV family for climate-trend layers & ML truth

records.name: Microsoft Planetary Computer
records.access: STAC API; Azure Blob (SAS); TiTiler tile/data API
records.variables: 100+ collections: Sentinel, Landsat, MODIS, ERA5, land cover
records.notes: Cleanest STAC+COG+tiler backend for globe & ML

records.name: AWS Open Data Registry / Earth on AWS
records.variables: Sentinel-2 COGs, ERA5, CMIP6, NOAA, Copernicus DEM, WorldCover (500+)

records.name: Google Earth Engine
records.variables: 1000+ datasets/100+PB: Landsat, Sentinel, MODIS, ERA5, CHIRPS, projections

records.name: Pangeo / Pangeo Forge catalogs
records.variables: CMIP6, ERA5 subsets, ocean models, obs

records.name: WeatherBench 2
records.variables: ERA5 ground truth + IFS/GraphCast/Pangu/NeuralGCM forecasts + eval

records.name: STAC Ecosystem / STAC Index
records.notes: Build catalog as STAC; harvesting seed list

records.name: OGC APIs (EDR/Tiles/Coverages)
records.variables: env data retrieval, features, coverages, maps, tiles

records.name: Cesium ion
records.variables: World Terrain, base imagery, Sentinel-2 cloudless

records.name: CMIP6 via ESGF
records.access: ESGF UIs; REST search API; OPeNDAP/HTTPS/Globus; intake-esgf
records.variables: ~2000 vars incl AMOC msftmz/msftyz, thetao, so, vo, hfbasin; SSP scenarios

records.name: CMIP6 Zarr on Google Cloud
records.notes: Best route for cloud AMOC ensemble computation

records.name: CMIP7 (Fast Track)
records.variables: new Fast Track scenarios; AMOC/ocean-circ retained
records.notes: Will supersede CMIP6 for AR7-era tipping; track now

records.name: AR6 Scenario Explorer
records.notes: Links emission pathways to warming levels

records.name: IPCC WGI Interactive Atlas
records.notes: Pre-aggregated warming-level fields = ready globe layers

records.name: CORDEX / CORDEX-CMIP6
records.notes: Regional detail; carries AMOC-collapse impact signatures

records.name: EURO-CORDEX
records.notes: Densest RCM ensemble; European AMOC-impact storylines

records.name: NASA NEX-GDDP-CMIP6
records.notes: Most convenient global high-res daily projection layer

records.name: CarbonPlan CMIP6 downscaling
records.notes: Only open multi-method global downscaling (maintenance mode)

records.name: DCPP (decadal predictions)
records.access: ESGF API/OPeNDAP; partial Zarr in gs://cmip6/
records.variables: dcppA hindcasts 1960-2019 + dcppB forecasts; msftmz, AMV/SPG

records.name: C3S seasonal forecasts
records.notes: Seasonal layer for a live globe

records.name: NMME
records.variables: tref, prec, SST; ~8 models, leads 0-11 months

records.name: CESM2 Large Ensemble (LENS2)
records.notes: Gold standard: forced AMOC decline vs internal variability

records.name: CESM1 Large Ensemble
records.notes: Longest-used LE for AMOC internal-variability stats

records.name: MPI Grand Ensemble
records.notes: Best for AMOC noise stats & early-warning false-alarm rates

records.name: TIPMIP
records.variables: AMOC hosing, overshoot, ice sheet, permafrost, biosphere experiments

records.name: Ditlevsen & Ditlevsen 2023 AMOC tipping
records.variables: AMOC SST-fingerprint index + ramped-OU tipping-time estimator
records.notes: Reusable statistical AMOC tipping-time estimator (~2057 best est)

records.name: van Westen et al. 2024 CESM AMOC collapse run
records.variables: freshwater-hosing CESM AMOC collapse; FovS early-warning indicator
records.notes: Benchmark simulated AMOC collapse; FovS computable across CMIP6

records.name: TiPES / ClimTip / TipESM
records.variables: early-warning-signal methods, box-model/EMIC datasets, paleo tipping

records.name: ECMWF AIFS + ECMWF Open Data
records.access: GRIB via data.ecmwf.int + cloud mirrors; HF weights
records.notes: Only operational AI forecast with fully open real-time data

records.name: GraphCast / Pangu / FourCastNet
records.notes: Fast global field generation for animated layers

records.name: NeuralGCM
records.access: Open checkpoints + Zarr datasets from GCS
records.notes: Closest AI model to climate simulation (no ocean yet)

records.name: ISIMIP3
records.variables: bias-adjusted CMIP6 forcing + multi-sector impacts (water, ag, health, coastal)
records.notes: Turns tipping projections into human-impact layers

records.name: KNMI Climate Explorer
records.variables: CMIP5/6, reanalyses, AMOC indices, SST fingerprints

records.name: Destination Earth Climate DT
records.access: Earth Data Hub (STAC + Zarr); Polytope API
records.notes: Highest-res open climate sims; realistic AMOC variability

records.name: NOAA GML Trends (Mauna Loa CO2)
records.variables: CO2 (also CH4, N2O, SF6); global marine mean
records.notes: Keeling curve; headline CO2 counter + model boundary

records.name: NOAA GML GGGRN / ObsPack
records.access: Bulk download; ObsPack tarballs; Data Finder
records.variables: CO2, CH4, N2O, SF6, CO, isotopes
records.notes: Standard constraint for atmospheric inversion/flux models

records.name: Scripps CO2 Program
records.notes: Longest continuous CO2 record (independent of NOAA)

records.name: ICOS Carbon Portal
records.variables: CO2, CH4, N2O, CO; ecosystem fluxes; ocean pCO2

records.name: TCCON
records.variables: column XCO2, XCH4, XN2O, XCO, XH2O

records.name: AGAGE
records.variables: CH4, N2O, CFCs, HCFCs, HFCs, SF6, ~50+ species

records.name: WMO GAW / WDCGG
records.variables: CO2, CH4, N2O, SF6, CFCs, CO, O3
records.notes: Broadest station aggregation for globe markers

records.name: NOAA GML HATS halocarbons
records.variables: N2O, SF6, CFCs, HCFCs, HFCs, halons

records.name: OCO-2 / OCO-3
records.notes: Primary satellite XCO2 for flux inversions

records.name: GOSAT-GW / TANSO-3
records.variables: XCO2, XCH4, NO2 (wide swath + target mode)

records.name: Sentinel-5P / TROPOMI
records.variables: XCH4, CO, NO2, O3, SO2, HCHO, aerosol index
records.notes: Workhorse for global daily methane maps + plume hunting

records.name: MethaneSAT (archive)
records.notes: Mission ended (contact lost Jun 2025); archived flux maps remain

records.name: Carbon Mapper / Tanager-1
records.variables: CH4/CO2 plumes, emission rates, source attribution
records.notes: Best facility-level super-emitter feed with an API

records.name: NASA EMIT plumes
records.access: Earthdata Search / LP DAAC S3; US GHG Center
records.notes: High-res plume COGs; complements Carbon Mapper

records.name: Copernicus CO2M (Sentinel-7) [upcoming]
records.notes: First mission to image anthropogenic CO2 plumes globally

records.name: Copernicus/C3S Satellite GHG ECV
records.notes: Harmonized long XCO2/XCH4 grids; easiest to animate 20+yr

records.name: EDGAR
records.access: Direct download; JRC Data Catalogue DOIs
records.variables: CO2, CH4, N2O, F-gases + pollutants by sector

records.name: Global Carbon Budget
records.variables: fossil CO2, land-use emissions, ocean/land sinks, budget
records.notes: Authoritative annual carbon budget; mass-balance sanity checks

records.name: CEDS
records.variables: CO2, CH4, N2O, BC, OC, SO2, NOx, CO, NMVOC, NH3 by sector

records.name: PRIMAP-hist
records.variables: Kyoto GHGs by country + IPCC sector, CO2eq
records.notes: Cleanest gap-filled all-country all-gas series for choropleths

records.name: UNFCCC GHG Inventory Data
records.access: Data Interface web query + bulk download
records.variables: all Kyoto gases, full IPCC sector detail, LULUCF

records.name: FAOSTAT Emissions
records.variables: CH4, N2O, CO2 from agriculture, fires, land use

records.name: GFED (Global Fire Emissions)
records.variables: fire CO2, CO, CH4, PM2.5, BC/OC; burned area

records.name: CDIAC Legacy Archive
records.notes: Historical depth to 1751 for long training series

records.name: US EPA GHGRP / FLIGHT
records.variables: facility CO2e by gas and subpart

records.name: Climate TRACE
records.variables: CO2, CH4, N2O, CO2e for 660M+ assets, ~70 sectors
records.notes: Only global facility-level monthly all-sector dataset; star globe layer

records.name: IEA Methane Tracker
records.variables: CH4 from oil/gas/coal/bioenergy by country; abatement
records.notes: Best country-level energy-methane split with abatement scenarios

records.name: UNEP IMEO / MARS
records.variables: detected CH4 super-emitter events, notified plumes

records.name: Our World in Data CO2 & GHG
records.variables: CO2 (production/consumption), CH4, N2O, GHG, per-capita, cumulative
records.notes: Most convenient single CSV for country choropleths

records.name: Climate Action Tracker
records.variables: country ratings, projected 2030 emissions, warming estimates
records.notes: Qualitative ratings layer; no formal API

records.name: CAMS (Copernicus Atmosphere)
records.variables: CO2, CH4 3D fields, CO, O3, NO2, SO2, aerosols; flux inversions
records.notes: Gap-free 3D global CO2/CH4 field for volumetric rendering

records.name: NASA GEOS-CF
records.notes: Hourly global composition + forecast, no registration

records.name: OpenAQ
records.access: REST API v3 (free key); S3 archive
records.variables: PM2.5, PM10, NO2, O3, SO2, CO, BC

records.name: AERONET
records.variables: AOD multi-wavelength, Angstrom, SSA, size dist

records.name: MODIS AOD (MOD04/MAIAC)
records.notes: Canonical daily aerosol map; VIIRS continuity ahead

records.name: WOUDC (ozone/UV)
records.variables: total column ozone, ozonesonde profiles, UV

records.name: NOAA AGGI
records.variables: radiative forcing by gas, index vs 1990

records.name: Indicators of Global Climate Change (IGCC)
records.variables: ERF by component, GHG concentrations, attributed warming, energy imbalance, carbon budget

records.name: CMIP Historical GHG Concentrations (Meinshausen)
records.variables: surface concentrations of 43 GHGs, latitudinally resolved
records.notes: Concentration boundary conditions used by CMIP models

records.name: NOAA NCEI Paleoclimatology (WDS-Paleo)
records.access: Paleo Data Search UI; FTP/HTTPS tree; JSON metadata
records.variables: temperature, precip, d18O, tree-ring, pollen, Pa/Th, sortable silt
records.notes: Master archive; hosts AMOC proxy series (Pa/Th, sortable silt)

records.name: PANGAEA
records.variables: marine sediment cores, geochemistry, isotopes, benthic d18O
records.notes: Deep repository for marine cores underpinning AMOC reconstructions

records.name: Neotoma Paleoecology Database
records.access: REST API; neotoma2 R pkg; Explorer

records.name: LinkedEarth / LiPDverse
records.notes: Machine-readable proxy format for data-assimilation pipelines

records.name: EPICA Ice Cores
records.variables: CO2, CH4, dD, d18O, dust, temperature
records.notes: Longest orbital-scale record; bipolar seesaw context

records.name: NGRIP / NEEM / GISP2 Greenland cores
records.notes: Records D-O/Heinrich events tied to AMOC reorganizations

records.name: WAIS Divide Ice Core
records.notes: High-res Antarctic counterpart for seesaw timing

records.name: SISALv3 speleothems
records.access: SQL dump; NCEI mirror; web app
records.variables: speleothem d18O, d13C, trace elements, U-Th chronologies

records.name: Pa/Th & Sortable-Silt AMOC proxies
records.variables: 231Pa/230Th ratios, sortable silt grain size (flow-speed proxy)
records.notes: Direct proxies of past AMOC strength & Younger Dryas slowdowns

records.name: GRDC river discharge
records.notes: Ground-truth river discharge; freshwater flux context

records.name: GloFAS (Copernicus EMS)
records.notes: Gridded discharge for globe flood-risk animation

records.name: HydroLAKES / GloLakes
records.variables: 1.4M lake polygons; GloLakes water storage/level dynamics
records.notes: Lake extent + storage change globe layer

records.name: FLUXNET2015 / AmeriFlux / ICOS fluxes
records.notes: Point-scale carbon/water fluxes for model benchmarking

records.name: EM-DAT
records.variables: disaster events (deaths, affected, loss) by type

records.name: IBTrACS v04r01
records.notes: Track lines = vector overlays for the globe

records.name: HadEX3 extremes indices
records.notes: Gridded extremes indices for globe visualization

records.name: NASA FIRMS (active fire)
records.variables: MODIS & VIIRS active fire detections, FRP
records.notes: Point fire detections; vivid animated globe layer

records.name: MTBS burn severity
records.notes: High-res US burn severity for zoom-in

records.name: ESA WorldCover 10m
records.notes: Highest-res global land cover; base texture

records.name: MODIS Land Cover (MCD12Q1)
records.notes: Consistent annual LC for change animation

records.name: Hansen Global Forest Change
records.variables: tree cover, forest loss year, gain

records.name: Copernicus European State of the Climate / CDS
records.variables: ERA5 reanalysis, extremes indicators, sectoral indices

records.name: OBIS (Ocean Biodiversity Information System)
records.notes: Marine counterpart to GBIF; tracks poleward/deeper shifts of ocean life

records.name: Living Planet Index
records.notes: Closest global *abundance* dataset (~73% avg decline since 1970); complements GBIF presence data

records.name: MODIS Land Surface Temperature
records.notes: Actual ground/skin temperature over land; key-free GIBS tiles (used in the globe's land-surface-temperature layer)
